nJ.description: Number of distinct apartment floor areas

K.description: Total number of floors in the tower

R.description: Number of apartments with each floor area in each configuration

O.description: Profit per apartment for sector, floor area, and owner class

m.description: Minimum floor area required for each sector and owner class

a.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must belong to each sector

s.description: Minimum average floor area required for apartments in each sector

o.description: Minimum fraction of total apartments that must belong to each owner class

notes: We add implicit assumptions that all sets are non-empty, $R_{jv}, \text{area}_j, m_{ih}, a_i, s_i, o_h \geq 0$, and that `iFree` and `hCorp` are valid indices in the `nI` and `nH` dimensions, respectively.
